name: trinuc_CTG_100bp
description: (CTG)n trinucleotide expansion, 100 bp total (33 copies). DM1-like: Myotonic dystrophy DMPK 3'UTR repeat. Reverse-strand of CAG; forms hairpins. Stresses mapper handling of pathogenic short tandem repeats.
sources: synthetic, designed as mapper stress test — no biological source
